description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large glass windows dominating the front facade. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several mature trees and a privacy fence enclosing the property. A swimming pool and a circular hot tub are situated in the backyard, adjacent to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by blue-tinted windows and minimalistic railings. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper floor set back to create a terrace overlooking the pool. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between the interior and exterior environments.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large blue-tinted windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The design is geometric and open, with a light exterior and mature trees surrounding the property.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, upper terrace, and landscaped yard with trees and a privacy fence.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large blue-tinted windows, main entrance, and pool area with hot tub and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, hot tub, and the full length of the privacy fence.
description_view_3: Back side view revealing the upper terrace, rear windows, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front-facing windows
